methods.description: Establishing the age model of core KY using planktic foraminiferal 14C dating and the K-Ah ash layer.

steps.description: The age model of core KY was established based on planktic foraminiferal 14C (fourteen horizons) and the K-Ah ash layer.
steps.searchable_summary: establish age model using 14C dating and ash layer

methods.description: Analyzing elemental concentrations using Sc as the internal standard and preparing working standards for Ca and Mg.

steps.description: Ca, Mn were analyzed using Sc as the internal standard.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze elemental concentrations using Sc standard

steps.description: Four working standards were prepared by successive dilutions of the stock standard solutions to match the concentrations of Ca and Mg.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare working standards for Ca and Mg
outputs: working standards for Ca and Mg

methods.description: Cleaning samples using oxidative and reductive methods and analyzing Mg/Ca values.

steps.description: Most of the samples of the core KY were cleaned by reductive methods but thirty-eight samples in Holocene section are cleaned by oxidative methods.
steps.searchable_summary: clean samples using oxidative and reductive methods

steps.description: To verify difference of Mg/Ca values between reductive and oxidative cleaning methods, fifteen randomly selected samples were re-picked and cleaned with both methods.
steps.searchable_summary: compare Mg/Ca values between cleaning methods

methods.description: Estimating the calcification depth of G. ruber based on δ18O studies and plankton tow observations.

steps.description: The calcification depth of G. ruber is estimated to be upper 30 m of the water column based on the study of δ18O from surface and downcore sediment samples.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate calcification depth using δ18O data

steps.description: A plankton tow observation has shown that G. ruber was abundant during summer in vicinity of the core site.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze plankton tow data for G. ruber abundance
